title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.010 - Notification of occupancy of factory
text:
292.010.  Notification of occupancy of factory. — Within one month after the occupancy of any factory, workshop or mill, the occupant shall notify the director in writing, of such occupancy.
(RSMo 1939 § 10199) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13239; 1919 § 6804; 1909 § 7845
